name: Artichoke Nibbles
recipeIngredient: 2 garlic cloves, peeled and finely chopped
2 6-ounce jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. Heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic, and cook until soft, about 5 minutes.
4. In a medium mixing bowl, combine sauteed onions with artichoke hearts, eggs, salt, breadcrumbs, pepper, Tabasco, cheese, parsley, and oregano. Mix well.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until set in the center when lightly touched.
7. Let cool in the pan and cut into 1-inch squares.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings.
